title: Blueprint Node
description: A single structural node in an ASISaga Genesis blueprint. Carries structural intent only — no token values, no animation parameters.

id.description: Unique identifier for this node within its blueprint (kebab-case).

name.description: Human-readable label (Title Case). Slugified automatically to form CSS class: 'Site Header' → '.node--site-header'.

type.description: Structural node type. FRAME = page-level container; COMPONENT = reusable unit; INSTANCE = placed component; TEXT = leaf text node; GROUP = logical grouping.

asi-saga.description: The Ontological Handshake — three mandatory metadata fields that connect structure to the Token DNA and Motion Physics layers.

semantic-tag.description: The HTML5 element that best represents the semantic purpose of this node.

motion-intent.description: A token path referencing a named physics behaviour in the Motion Physics layer. Format: '<phase>/<behaviour>'. The blueprint declares INTENT only — execution belongs to the Motion Physics skill.

layout-variant.description: One of the 89 Genesis ontological variants. Format: '<category>/<variant>'. The blueprint declares the VARIANT only — visual execution belongs to the Token DNA skill.

layoutMode.description: Spatial flow direction for child nodes. Maps to CSS flex-direction or display:grid.

itemSpacing.description: Token reference for the gap between child nodes. Must match a key in the Token DNA spacing scale. Update this pattern when new tokens are added to _data/tokens.yml.

content.description: Static text content or a Liquid expression (e.g., '{{ site.title }}'). Only valid on TEXT and leaf nodes.

attributes.description: Additional HTML attributes to place on the semantic element (e.g., href, aria-label, data-*).

ref.description: Pointer to another blueprint file to be inlined at this position during sync. Resolved by blueprint-to-code skill before Jekyll reads the file.

children.description: Ordered child nodes. Maximum depth: 5 levels (enforced by validate-blueprint.sh).
